intro: Micropeplis foliosa is a plant species native to Africa, belonging to the family Acanthaceae and commonly known as 'Umckaloabo'. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help relieve congestion and coughs.
